# Studylancer

Studylancer is an escrow-protected peer-to-peer learning marketplace where students can post bounties to learn topics or accept requests to teach and earn money.

## Key Features
- **Set Your Own Budget**: Decide what a topic is worth to you.
- **Escrow Transaction Security**: Automated escrow system ensures zero risk.
- **Transparent Profiles**: Verified student profiles and ratings.
- **Total Scheduling Control**: Flexible dates and times.
